title: EC Ice and Fire Compat
description: adds compatibility between expanded combat and ice and fire.
body:
[![CurseForge Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3494a91b8d02c32063e94ab08f6dd796b5bb4634.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ec-ice-and-fire-compat) [![Cloth Config API Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7bff26028f093d51d9da01e07e384f91f63ae13.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) [![Curios dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aec5c41ae6f0aac946a80fe3cf688a7a336fa09_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) [![Expanded Combat Dependency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59e9eeade55f309be535f0b860f0219c8863d4b0_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) [![Ice And Fire Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac0bc79bd27a1d52ba7f8ffdd8c432ff631da6c2_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons)
A plugin Mod for [Expanded Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) adding compatibility with [Ice And Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons). #### Adds support for: Silver: everything in EC but arrows \ Copper: everything in EC but arrows \ Myrmex chitin (both types): everything in EC but arrows and block type weapons \ Dragon steel (all 3 types): everything in EC but arrows \ Dragon scale (all 12 types): gauntlets and shields \ Dragon bone: all weapons \ Sea Serpent (all 7 types): gauntlets and shields \ Death Worm Chitin (all 3 types): gauntlets and shields \ Troll leather (all 3 types): gauntlets and shields \ recipes available in jei \ \ \ Click the banner to get the discount: [![Bisect Hosting Promotional](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/91cdbb92-a3db-4f62-a182-239fe5589b2a.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/userofbricks)
